pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.7 to 3.4.5 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 10 standards.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21.
Remove --enable-preview compiler and surefire arguments as preview features are no longer used or required.
Split compilation into two executions to handle custom annotation processors correctly in Java 21.
Upgrade JaCoCo version to 0.8.12 to support Java 21 bytecode.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Replace the auto-configuration class in spring.factories to point to a new ConfigScan class instead of the old RedisConfiguration, likely as part of the Spring Boot 3 migration.
